framework: UNESCO AI Competency Framework for Teachers (AI-CFT) 2024

methodology.aggregation_note: Evidence excerpts are grouped by LO for side-by-side review with UNESCO indicator text. No automated AI-CFT level or domain convergence is computed.

lo_review_packets.LO3.1.1:
=== LO3.1.1 (Acquire) ===
Basic AI techniques and applications — conceptual knowledge

Foundational vocabulary and concepts only: object, feature, label, dataset, decision, threshold, basic ML terminology. Recall and explain — not tool operation.

Aspect 3, Acquire — foundational conceptual knowledge of AI systems.

--- Kanıt ---
[codap_log] WS_DT/DT_A_Q1 Bence, sahip olduğu enerji ve yağ oranı sağlar.
[codap_log] WS_DT/DT_E_sensitivity 0.737
[codap_log] WS_DT/DT_E_MCR 0.2
[codap_log] WS_DT/DT_G_Q1 Hangi besinleri seçmesi gerektiğini algoritmasını oluşturdu.
lo_review_packets.LO3.1.2:
=== LO3.1.2 (Acquire) ===
How AI works — foundational understanding

Explains what decision trees do, why data is needed, and distinguishes AI from non-AI approaches at a conceptual level.

Aspect 3, Acquire — understanding of how AI systems work.

--- Kanıt ---

[codap_log] WS_DT/DT_A_Q2 Enerji, yağ, şeker...
lo_review_packets.LO3.1.3:
=== LO3.1.3 (Acquire) ===
Validated AI tool selection

Locates, validates, and selects appropriate AI tools (e.g. CODAP, Arbor, EMIT) for an educational data-analysis task.

Aspect 3, Acquire — locate and evaluate AI tools for educational use.

--- Kanıt ---
[codap_log] WS_DT/DT_B_Q1 MCR: 0.2, sensitivity: 0.737
lo_review_packets.LO3.2.1:
=== LO3.2.1 (Deepen) ===
Evaluate → select → apply AI tools in educational context

Demonstrates evaluate → select → apply cycle: choose variables, build multiple models/trees, compare performance — not threshold arithmetic alone.

Aspect 3, Deepen — operate and apply AI tools in educational contexts.

--- Kanıt ---
[codap_log] WS_DT/DT_B_Q3 Performansta değişiklik gözlemledim. -> MCR değerim ve sens değerimde azalma gözlemledim.
[codap_log] WS_DT/DT_B_Q4 En iyi sonucu enerjide aldım. Onun yanında doymuş yağ miktarı da iyi ise yaradı.
lo_review_packets.LO3.2.2:
=== LO3.2.2 (Deepen) ===
Application skills — model behaviour and threshold reasoning

Apply, interpret, compare, justify: threshold application and optimization, decision-tree construction/representation, rule articulation, model behaviour.

Aspect 3, Deepen — Application Skills: explain model behaviour, interpret results, evaluate parameters, select appropriate approaches.

lo_review_packets.LO3.2.3:
=== LO3.2.3 (Deepen) ===
Problem solving — iterative performance improvement

Real problem solving with iterative refinement: optimize thresholds, build multi-level trees, evaluate on test data, improve performance.

Aspect 3, Deepen — apply transferable knowledge to solve real problems.

--- Kanıt ---
